description_long: This is a vintage-style motorcycle with a military green paint job and a visibly weathered, rugged finish. The frame is constructed from metal, with large, spoked wheels and thick, treaded tires that show signs of dirt and wear. The seat is black and appears to be made of leather or synthetic material, designed for a single rider. The motorcycle features a round headlamp, classic handlebars, and a visible exhaust pipe running along the right side. The engine and mechanical components are exposed, with a utilitarian design typical of mid-20th-century motorcycles. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, suitable for both urban and off-road environments.
description: A vintage military-green motorcycle with a weathered finish, black seat, and exposed mechanical parts. It features large spoked wheels, a round headlamp, and a classic utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlamp, handlebars, and the narrow profile of the front tire.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black seat, exposed engine, exhaust pipe, and the full length of the frame and wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the seat, rear fender, and the alignment of the rear wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the engine, chain guard, and the overall silhouette of the motorcycle.
